Now we have those linked.

Next, we need candidate_loading_verified. We can do either verify_loading_profile_nominal or with destination flag. Now, we need candidate_finalized and dispatch_ready. We can do (finalize_candidate_direct shift_candidate_beta). Now we have dispatched destination_availability_alpha? We still need to do that dispatch. But note: we also need to have vehicle_available vehicle_unit_beta after dispatch. Also dispatch_slot_available. So after we finish shift_candidate_beta, we do the dispatch action.

We also need to ensure that we don't have any conflicts. The plan order: we should probably do the dispatch at the end, because it uses dispatch_slot_alpha.
